summary: Conscientious and enthusiastic student dedicated to every project with a passion for AI and software engineering
Strong background combining software engineering, data, and business strategy with hands-on experience in enterprise AI chatbots
Excellent team player with empathy and strong communication skills, committed to continuous learning and growth

education.description: Strong academic focus combining software engineering, data, and business strategy. High workload and rigorous program requiring strong discipline, adaptability, and continuous learning.

projects.name: Tu dia de blanco
bullets: A polished wedding web app that helps couples create elegant digital wedding experiences, collect guest information, manage event details, use AI functionality for easier management, and offer a guided inquiry flow for new clients.
Designed and built a wedding-focused platform with public landing pages, product pages, inquiry forms, authentication, registration flows, and private management screens.
Implemented Supabase-backed data storage, auth flows, Notion submission capture, Resend email templates, and structured registration data for guests and couples.
Created a warm, editorial interface tailored to engaged couples, balancing emotional presentation with practical tools and AI-assisted functionality for managing wedding-related workflows.
